children.heading: Annual amounts
children.label: 1 Annual amounts
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to FEMA to carry out sections 467e, 467f, and 467h of this title (in addition to any amounts made available for similar purposes included in any other Act and amounts made available under subsections (b) through (e)), $9,200,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2028, to remain available until expended.

children.label: i
children.text: One-third among States that qualify for assistance under .section 467f(e) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: the number of dams in the State that are listed as State-regulated dams on the inventory of dams and low-head dams maintained under ; as compared tosection 467d of this title

children.label: II
children.text: the number of dams in all States that are listed as State-regulated dams on the inventory of dams and low-head dams maintained under .section 467d of this title

children.heading: Maximum amount of allocation
children.label: B Maximum amount of allocation
children.text: The amount of funds allocated to a State under this paragraph for a fiscal year may not exceed the amount that is equal to 4 times the amount of funds committed by the State to implement dam safety activities for that fiscal year.

children.heading: Determination
children.label: C Determination
children.text: The Administrator and the Board shall determine the amount allocated to States.

children.heading: National inventory of dams and low-head dams
children.label: b National inventory of dams and low-head dams
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out $500,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2028.section 467d of this title

children.heading: Public awareness
children.label: c Public awareness
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2028.section 467g–2 of this title

children.heading: Research
children.label: d Research
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out $1,450,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2028, to remain until expended.section 467g of this title

children.heading: Dam safety training
children.label: e Dam safety training
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out $750,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2028.section 467g–1 of this title

children.heading: Staff
children.label: f Staff
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to FEMA for the employment of such additional staff personnel as are necessary to carry out sections 467f through 467g–1 of this title $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2028.

children.heading: Limitation on use of amounts
children.label: g Limitation on use of amounts
children.text: Amounts made available under this subchapter may not be used to construct or repair any Federal or non-Federal dam.
